encoding: Signed meters are stored as unsigned 16-bit value = clamp(round(meters) + 32768, 0, 65535). Each 16-character RGB mask runs source bit 15 to bit 0; a 1 copies that source bit into the channel, packed left-to-right into channel bits 7 to 0.
source: PDS Magellan GXDR GTDR sinusoidal topography radius map

zeroLevel.definition: 0 m is the area-weighted median radius of the reprojected output grid

nodataHandling: GTDR DN=0 samples were treated as no-data. Bilinear sampling ignores zero-valued neighbors; fully missing samples are filled from the complete 1-degree Magellan TOPOGRD grid.
